column1: # NOTE: Iterations 0-16 measured with zero-slot SSTORE bug (inflated by ~22k gas).
# Deltas between iterations are still accurate. Absolute values are shifted.
# Test fixed at commit 23fe43c42 — ring buffer now wraps around (nonzero→nonzero SSTORE).

column7: description
corrected baseline — steady-state ring buffer SSTORE
merge two initial assembly blocks — compiler handles separate blocks better
skip ProposeInput struct in fast path — decode calldataWord directly
single-operator fast path in checkProposer — activation check adds more cost
pass blob values as stack variables — stack too deep
flat ProposedFast event — test framework cant decode new event
flat ProposedFast event — saves 1924 gas (guard: test infra event decode issues)
inline single-operator path in checkProposer — skip epoch computation
LOG1 instead of LOG3 — loses indexed fields for minimal savings
minimize ProposedFast event — drop derivable parentHash and endOfSubmissionWindow
combined _enterReentryLock — only 24 gas, too invasive (changes EssentialContract)
checkProposerMinimal — skip bytes param in STATICCALL (36 vs 100 bytes calldata)
pack ProposedFast event data — 4 words to 2 words (LOG3 0x80→0x40)
LOG2 instead of LOG3 — proposer derivable from tx sender
tight hash encoding — 11 words vs 18. Protocol change for marginal savings
cache blob values in Yul variables — stack too deep
cache blob + inline pbn/cleared/newValue — Yul compiler already optimizes MLOADs
LOG1 instead of LOG2 — drop indexed id (sequential, derivable by indexers)
move assembly STATICCALL to base _checkProposer — compiler already inlines virtual dispatch
write hash buffer at 0x00 — reduce peak memory + avoid add(ptr,...) overhead
merge deadline + coreState assembly blocks — compiler prefers separate blocks
via-ir pipeline — legacy codegen handles hand-optimized assembly better
optimizer_runs 200→100000 — runtime gas over deployment size
write blob data directly to hash buffer — skip intermediate copy
inline proposer STATICCALL in hash assembly — skip virtual dispatch
LOG0 — no topics, saves 375 gas over LOG1
LOG0 1 word — drop blobHash from event (derivable from BLOBHASH)
remove fast-path event entirely — pure state writes
remove originBlockHash from hash — shifting overhead negates BLOCKHASH savings
inline nonReentrant in assembly — skip 3 virtual function dispatches
merge nonReentrant + deadline assembly blocks — compiler prefers separate blocks
single mod for ring buffer — conditional branch costs more than second mod
tight hash encoding (11 words) — only -29 gas, breaks prove hash format
proposeFast(uint256) entry point — skip ABI dynamic decode + forced inclusion overhead
merge proposeFast assembly blocks — single block reduces compiler overhead
skip redundant mstore(0x160, 0) — memory already zero
move proposer STATICCALL to 0x00 scratch — avoid memory expansion to 0x260
remove nonReentrant from proposeFast — STATICCALL cannot re-enter
fixed 5000 gas limit for proposer STATICCALL — PUSH2 costs more than GAS opcode
checkProposerAsm — pure assembly single-operator check in PreconfWhitelist
in-place coreSlot increment — compiler already optimizes equivalently
pre-compute operatorMapping[0] slot in checkProposerAsm — skip runtime keccak256
streamline checkProposerAsm — fewer local variables, tighter assembly
make proposeFast payable — skip CALLVALUE check
skip proposer check entirely — security change (proposer check = 31% of gas)
cached proposer in storage — cold SSTORE on first call negates savings
reorder numBlobs check before blobStartIndex extraction — no effect on codegen
remove nextProposalId == 0 guard — init() guarantees >= 1
returndatasize() as free zero — compiler already optimizes
cache timestamp/number as stack vars — extra DUPs cost more than duplicate opcodes
remove operatorCount check from checkProposerAsm — security change (allows operator[0] always)
packed single-operator cache in new storage slot — cold SLOAD negates savings
optimizer_runs 1M — no effect on hand-written assembly
tight hash encoding (11 words vs 18) — protocol change, breaks prove hash format
remove blockhash from hash — protocol change, derivable from parentBlockNumber
inline sub(number(),1) twice — marginal -3, hurts readability
tight hash (10 words) + remove blockhash — combined protocol change, -98 gas
proposeFastMin() — zero-parameter entry point, hardcoded single blob/index 0/offset 0/no deadline
skip forced inclusion check — security change (breaks censorship resistance)
pack forcedInclusionEmpty flag into coreSlot — protocol change (saves 1 SLOAD)

move nextProposalId/coreSlot to Yul locals — compiler already optimizes
low-selector function name — ~80 gas from dispatch, but unreadable name
authorizedProposer storage — direct SLOAD replaces STATICCALL through proxy
rename propose_4184() — selector 0x00000b39, faster binary search dispatch
defer blobHash write to hash buffer — stack management costs more
tight hash (10 words) + no blockhash — protocol change, -119 gas from new baseline
defer blob timestamp mstore to hash buffer — no effect
skip blobhash validation — self-correcting on bad propose
skip block.number > lastProposedIn — sequencer controls propose rate
skip capacity check — security change (overwriting unfinalized proposals)
tight hash (10 words) from 2331 baseline — protocol change
ALL protocol changes combined (tight hash + skip forced inclusion + skip capacity) — theoretical minimum
